title: SeverTools
description: This plugin provides a comprehensive set of tools for server management, including features like AFK detection, short game mode commands, an economy system, and support for legacy combat mechanics, all configurable via YAML files.
body:
# ServerTools

ServerTools is a Minecraft plugin that makes managing your server easier. It adds useful features for both admins and players.

## What It Does

- **Custom Tab Menu**: Make your server tab list look cool.
- **Economy**: Let players earn and spend money.
- **Homes**: Players can set and teleport to their homes.
- **Teleport Requests**: Players can ask to teleport to each other.
- **AFK System**: Show when players are away from keyboard.
- **Game Mode Shortcuts**: Quickly change between survival, creative, etc.
- **Fly Command**: Let certain players fly in any game mode.
- **1.8 Combat**: Can turn off and on 1.8 combat in the config.

## How to Install

1. Download ServerTools
2. Put the ServerTools.jar file in your server's "plugins" folder
3. Restart your server
4. Edit the config files in the ServerTools folder to set it up how you want

## What You Need

- Minecraft server (Spigot or Paper) version 1.21 or newer
- PlaceholderAPI plugin

## Optional Stuff

- Vault: Needed for the economy feature
- LuckPerms: Enableds the tab menu.

## Need Help?

- Check out our [Wiki](https://github.com/SamTechAV/ServerTools/wiki) for guides
- Join our [Discord] (comming soon) to ask questions
- Report bugs on our [GitHub](https://github.com/SamTechAV/ServerTools/issues)

## Made By

ServerTools is created by SamTech. We're always working to make it better!
